summary: Standalone Sync-Service: spiegelt Nextcloud Public-Shares auf lokale Content-Ordner. Manueller Pull-Mirror mit Conflict-Detection, Brand-Mapping, Safety-Gates. Node.js, HTTP API auf Port 28570.
owns: Nextcloud WebDAV Client (PROPFIND, share normalization, Basic auth)
Sync Planner (pull-mirror plan generation, conflict detection)
Sync Runner (atomic file operations, conflict resolution, ordered execution)
Sync State / Baseline Tracking (drift detection between syncs)
consumes: Nextcloud WebDAV — public share PROPFIND + GET (external, read-only)
avms-app-mocon — optional POST to content rescan endpoint after sync
consumedBy: avms-app-mocon — Cloud Sync Operator Panel (HTTP API consumer)

capabilities.name: Nextcloud Cloud Sync
capabilities.summary: Manual pull-mirror from Nextcloud public shares to local folders

capabilities.name: Conflict Detection
capabilities.summary: Baseline-tracked drift detection with user-driven resolution (replace/keep/cancel)

capabilities.name: Brand Folder Mapping
capabilities.summary: Map remote top-level folders to local brand directories

protectedBehaviors.name: No silent data loss
protectedBehaviors.summary: Deletes require explicit deletePolicy + confirmDeletes flag, atomic file operations via temp files
protectedBehaviors.whyProtected: Content loss on kiosk machines is unrecoverable without backup
protectedBehaviors.verificationHint: Run sync with mirror-delete policy → API requires confirmDeletes, temp files used for downloads

protectedBehaviors.name: User-driven conflict resolution
protectedBehaviors.summary: When local file changed since last sync, user must decide per-conflict (replace/keep/cancel)
protectedBehaviors.whyProtected: Automated overwrites could destroy operator edits
protectedBehaviors.verificationHint: Modify local file → re-plan → plan shows conflict → run requires user decision

protectedBehaviors.name: Sync baseline tracking
protectedBehaviors.summary: After successful sync, baseline state saved for next conflict detection
protectedBehaviors.whyProtected: Without baseline, every file looks like a conflict
protectedBehaviors.verificationHint: After sync, check sync-state.json contains file sizes and mtimes
